[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000100 1
1 1100110 4
2 1011000 3
3 0100100 2
4 0101001 3
5 0111011 5
6 0010110 3
7 1111100 5

12 21 0000100 1 match 0
23 32 1000000 1
34 43 0000000 a
45 54 0100000 1
56 65 0101001 3 match 4
67 76 0010010 2
70 07 0010100 2

61 16 0000000 a
72 27 0000110 2
